name: rampstack
description: RampStack Claude Skills: the website lifecycle as installable skills.

plugins.name: rampstack-skills
plugins.description: Full catalog of website-lifecycle skills: research, brand, build, and audit.

plugins.name: rampstack-starter
plugins.description: Curated starter subset of the RampStack catalog: a general-purpose skill set for the website lifecycle.

plugins.name: rampstack-seo
plugins.description: Focused SEO skills: keyword research, on-page and technical audits, AI-search optimization, traffic diagnosis, site-health triage, competitor and content audits, and programmatic SEO, with content companions.

plugins.name: rampstack-pm
plugins.description: Focused product management skills across the lifecycle: discovery, roadmaps and OKRs, PRDs, stakeholder communication, launch and beta programs, and measurement.
